title: hieracium subcapillatum
intro: Hieracium subcapillatum, also known as the lesser hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to treat wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium subcapillatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Hieracium subcapillatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used topically in the form of a salve or poultice to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
